title: narcissus × semipartitus
intro: Narcissus × semipartitus is a hybrid of the daffodil, known for its unique trumpet-shaped flowers and robust growth. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing pain, and soothing digestive issues. The plant is rich in compounds that have been shown to have health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving mood, and protecting against certain diseases. In herbal preparations, the bulbs of Narcissus × semipartitus are often used to create teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to relieve symptoms of colds, fever, and other health conditions.
